creator: adamw@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 153642
0.25

Attached patch updates to 0.25.

Changes: https://metacpan.org/changes/distribution/Text-VimColor

The 'use inc::VimColor' in Makefile.PL fails in poudriere during configure, but works outside the jail. Not sure what's going on there, but simply patching it out makes the port build and install fine, and it passes 'make test'.
